data.department_name: Wydział Informatyki i Nauki o Materiałach

visualization.title: Departments by Building
visualization.description: Overview of which departments are located in which buildings

resultRaw.sql:
SELECT 
  d.building,
  d.name AS department_name,
  d.code AS department_code
FROM public.departments d
WHERE d.building IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY d.building, d.name

sample.department_name: Wydział Informatyki i Nauki o Materiałach
